design_philosophy: Neo-Brutalist SaaS Dashboard. Raw, bold structures with thick borders, dominant typography, and extreme contrast ratios. Focus on operational utility, data clarity, and 'control room' aesthetics.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
spacing_and_layout.surface_style: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout or border-2 border-black. Sharp edges, 0px border-radius.

components.buttons: rounded-none border-2 border-black bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors duration-150 data-[variant=primary]:bg-[#002FA7] data-[variant=primary]:text-white data-[variant=primary]:border-black data-[variant=primary]:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:data-[variant=primary]:translate-y-[4px] hover:data-[variant=primary]:translate-x-[4px] hover:data-[variant=primary]:shadow-none
components.cards: rounded-none border-2 border-black bg-white p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
components.inputs: rounded-none border-2 border-black focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none bg-zinc-50 p-3
components.tabs: rounded-none border-b-2 border-black data-[state=active]:border-2 data-[state=active]:border-black data-[state=active]:bg-zinc-100 data-[state=active]:font-bold

screens.screen_1_upload: Center drag-and-drop zone. Massive dashed border (border-4 border-dashed border-black). Use IBM Plex Mono for upload instructions. Pure utilitarian feel.
screens.screen_2_profile: Control Room Grid (Dense). Radar chart with sharp, linear strokes (no curves). Large display text for Uniqueness Score (text-6xl font-black).
screens.screen_3_job_hunt: List of URL cards with brutalist offset shadow. Paste-jobs form uses high-contrast inputs.
screens.screen_4_ranked_jobs: Dense list. Tier 1 uses bright green accents, Tier 2 amber, Tier 3 red. All encapsulated in thick black borders. Progress bars for match score.
screens.screen_5_app_package: Brutalist file-folder tab style via Shadcn Tabs. Raw text areas for cover letters resembling a terminal or plain notepad.
screens.screen_6_kanban: 4 columns with border-r-2 border-black. Draggable cards are simple white rectangles with black borders.

image_urls.description: Minimalist graphic for empty states or empty kanban columns
Sleek, minimalist aesthetic for login or auth screen background

motion.philosophy: Snappy, raw utility. No elasticity. Instant visual feedback.
motion.hover: Buttons physically depress (translate X/Y by 4px) to eliminate offset shadow, making them feel extremely tactile. Hovering cards darkens the border slightly.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-btn').
accessibility.contrast: Extreme contrast. Text must be perfectly readable. Follow APCA standards.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato' or 'Space Grotesk' fonts.

Use pure HTML+Tailwind for layout structure. Use Shadcn for complex interactions (Tabs, Progress, Dialog) but heavily override classes to remove rounded corners (rounded-none) and add thick black borders (border-2 border-black).
Never use soft transparent shadows. Use solid black offset shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)].
Ensure data-testid attributes are placed on every form, input, button, and tab.
Integrate Recharts for Screen 2 Radar chart. Strip out soft curves, use sharp linear lines.
Install specific fonts via CSS imports and map them in tailwind.config.js.
